description:
Features:

  • - Vertical garden planter with four flower boxes
  • - Promote plant health by using separate soil types
  • - Fabric bottom makes it breathable, allows water drainage, and stops soil leakage
  • - Outdoor ready sealed Fir wood
  • - Tiered design saves space
  • - Assembly required

Specification:

  • - Color: Gray
  • - Material: Fir Wood
  • - Overall Dimensions: 31.5" L x 17.75" W x 56" H
  • - Bottom Layer Inner Size: 28.75" L x 16.5" W x 7.75" H
  • - Third Layer Inner Size: 28.75" L x 15.25" W x 5" H
  • - Second Layer Inner Size: 28.75" L x 14.25" W x 5" H
  • - Top Layer Inner Size: 28.75" L x 13" W x 5" H
  • - Height to the Ground: 7.75" / 19.75" / 35.5" / 49.5" H (from bottom to top)
  • - Weight Capacity: 220 lbs. / 88 lbs. / 66 lbs. / 66 lbs. (from bottom to top)

Package Includes:

  • - 1 x Garden Bed
  • - 1 x Manual
